title: UnderControl Scheduled Job
description: Schema for UnderControl scheduled job entities. Scheduled jobs run on a cron schedule to create tasks, generate AI summaries, trigger agents, or perform system maintenance.

id.description: Scheduled job UUID. Present = existing job (update). Absent = new job (create).

name.description: Human-readable name for the scheduled job.

description.description: Optional description of what this job does.

job_type.description: Type of job to execute. Determines which payload fields are relevant.

cron_expression.description: 5-field cron expression (minute hour dom month dow). Examples: '0 9 * * *' (daily 9am), '0 0 * * 1' (weekly Monday).

enabled.description: Whether the job is active and will be executed on schedule.

max_runtime_seconds.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the job is timed out.

payload.description: Job-type-specific payload. Fields depend on job_type.

description.description: (task_creation) Task description template. Include @agent mentions to trigger agents.

tags.description: (task_creation, ai_task_summary) Tags to apply to created tasks.

query.description: (ai_task_summary) Query to select tasks as context for AI summarization.

retention_days.description: (database_backup) Number of days to retain backup files.

data_path.description: (database_backup) Path to the data directory to back up.
